subtitles.original: 帰るね！
subtitles.english: I'm heading home!

subtitles.original: 今日は本当におめでとう！
subtitles.english: Happy birthday today!

subtitles.original: ラプくん、また遊ぼうね〜！
subtitles.english: Lap-kun, let's hang out again!

subtitles.original: あ、あじゅねえ！
subtitles.english: Ah, Aju-nee!

subtitles.original: あじゅねええええ！！
subtitles.english: Aju-neeeee!

subtitles.original: え、はい、はい。分かりました！
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, I understand!

subtitles.original: ラププラスさん！新曲オーディションですって！
subtitles.english: Laplus-san! Apparently there's an audition for a new song!

subtitles.original: どゆこと！？
subtitles.english: What do you mean!?

subtitles.original: 新曲だけのオーディション大会があって、そこで優勝したら、大型コラボですって！
subtitles.english: There's an audition competition with only new songs, and if you win, you get a massive collaboration!

subtitles.original: 今すぐ曲準備します！
subtitles.english: I'll prepare the song right away!

subtitles.original: ダンスレッスンいれますね！
subtitles.english: I'll book dance lessons!

subtitles.original: 今から新曲？ダンスレッスン？
subtitles.english: A new song starting now? Dance lessons?

subtitles.original: ま、間に合うのそれ？もうライブまでちょっとしかないよ？
subtitles.english: W-will we make it in time? There's barely any time left before the concert!

subtitles.original: 間に合わせてください！
subtitles.english: Please make it in time!

subtitles.original: もしオーディションに合格したら、大型コラボなんですよ！
subtitles.english: If we pass the audition, it's a major collaboration!

subtitles.original: えー！吾輩もう疲れたんですけど！！！
subtitles.english: What! I'm already exhausted!!!

subtitles.original: 大型コラボってなんなの！！
subtitles.english: What even is this "major collaboration" anyway!?

subtitles.original: それはまだ、秘密です。
subtitles.english: That is still a secret.

subtitles.original: なんでだよおおおお！！！
subtitles.english: Why the hell not!?

subtitles.original: はあ…はあ…はあ…
subtitles.english: Haah... haah... haah...

subtitles.original: 体力ないって言ってるのに、走り込み…？
subtitles.english: Even though I told you I have no stamina, I'm road running...?

subtitles.original: だからこその走り込みです！
subtitles.english: That's exactly why you need to do roadwork!

subtitles.original: この筋トレ、本当に意味あるのー！？
subtitles.english: Is this muscle training actually serving any purpose!?

subtitles.original: だっ、はあ…はあ…あぁぁ…
subtitles.english: Ugh... haah... haah...

subtitles.original: よし、良い感じです！
subtitles.english: Alright, looking good!

subtitles.original: ラプラスさん！本番前に行きましょう！
subtitles.english: Laplus-san, let's head out before the real deal!

subtitles.original: あの方の元へ！
subtitles.english: To that person's place!

subtitles.original: あ、あの方！？
subtitles.english: T-that person!?

subtitles.original: あーよし、行こう！
subtitles.english: Ah, alright, let's go!

subtitles.original: チョコ先生ーー！！
subtitles.english: Choco-sensei!

subtitles.original: あら、いらっしゃい、ラプちゃん。
subtitles.english: Oh, welcome, Lap-chan.

subtitles.original: どれにするの？
subtitles.english: Which one will you choose?

subtitles.original: うーん、悩んじゃうよね。
subtitles.english: Hmm, it's hard to make up your mind, isn't it?

subtitles.original: うーん、わかる、わかる。
subtitles.english: Hmm, I know, I know.

subtitles.original: 答えは1つじゃないからね。
subtitles.english: Because there isn't just one right answer.

subtitles.original: ラプちゃん真剣に考えてるのね。
subtitles.english: Lap-chan, you're thinking so hard about it.

subtitles.original: ん？全部ちゃんと見たいの？
subtitles.english: Hmm? You want to see them all properly?

subtitles.original: じゃあ、皆さんお待ちかねの、グッズ情報よ！
subtitles.english: Then, here is the merchandise info you've all been waiting for!

subtitles.original: ラプちゃーん！
subtitles.english: Lap-chaaaan!

subtitles.original: はーい！はいはいはーい！
subtitles.english: Yeees! Yes, yes, yeees!

subtitles.original: ラプラス・ダークネス、誕生日記念2026グッズ！
subtitles.english: Laplus Darkness Birthday Celebration 2026 Merchandise!

subtitles.original: 順番に紹介していきます！
subtitles.english: Let's introduce them one by one!

subtitles.original: じゃん！まずはこちら、カードアルバム！
subtitles.english: Tah-dah! First up is this, the card album!

subtitles.original: 特典の、あの、チェキ風ブロマイドカードとか、ホロカとかを収納できるアルバムです！
subtitles.english: This is an album where you can store bonus items, like the instax-style photo cards or HoloCards!

subtitles.original: えっと、めっちゃ久しぶりに黒野先生が、え、我が輩のママね。黒野ママが…
subtitles.english: And, for the first time in a really long time, Kurono-sensei... well, my illustrator mama, Kurono-mama...

subtitles.original: え、描き下ろしてくれました、イラスト！
subtitles.english: ...drew a brand new illustration!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: めっちゃ可愛い！
subtitles.english: It's so cute!

subtitles.original: はい、でしょ？
subtitles.english: Right?

subtitles.original: いや、このアルバムをぎゅっとしてるのが、また良いよね。
subtitles.english: And it's so nice how you're hugging this album.

subtitles.original: そう、でしょ？これもちゃんと、あのアルバムをぎゅっとしてるんですよ。写ってるやつを。
subtitles.english: Exactly! This illustration is actually hugging that exact album.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、これ買ったら、ラプちゃんがぎゅっとしたアルバムが手に入るってこと？
subtitles.english: So if we buy this, does that mean we get an album hugged by Lap-chan?

subtitles.original: え！？それはあの、商品法…？それ、刑訴…、刑訴…
subtitles.english: Huh!? That would be, um, Product Liability Law...? Or, Code of Criminal Procedure...?

subtitles.original: 刑訴的にいきます！
subtitles.english: ...we might be violating criminal procedure!

subtitles.original: 二つ目はこちら！興奮ボイスキーホルダー！
subtitles.english: The second item is this! The Excited Voice Keychain!

subtitles.original: え、毎回お馴染みの、撮り下ろしボイスが、が６種類入ったキーホルダーです！
subtitles.english: It's our usual keychain featuring 6 newly recorded voice lines!

subtitles.original: え、押すと声が出ます。いつも通り。今回もしろこ先生の描き下ろしです！
subtitles.english: Pressing it plays the audio, as usual. Once again, illustrated by Shiroko-sensei!

subtitles.original: メロメロな表情をした、オリジナルの、デフォルメ姿です！
subtitles.english: An original chibi design showing a totally lovesick expression!

subtitles.original: 押すと声が出る。
subtitles.english: Pressing it plays a voice.

subtitles.original: はい。
subtitles.english: Yes.

subtitles.original: へえ〜。
subtitles.english: Ooh...

subtitles.original: どこを押すのかな〜？
subtitles.english: I wonder where you press it~?

subtitles.original: 三つ目は、三つ目はこちら！
subtitles.english: The third... the third item is this!

subtitles.original: 「ばぶラプラスぬいぐるみ」です！
subtitles.english: The "Baby Laplus Plushie"!

subtitles.original: えっと、おしゃぶりを加えて、ベビーウェアを着て寝ている、我が輩のぬいぐるみでございます。
subtitles.english: It's a plushie of yours truly sucking on a pacifier and sleeping in baby clothes.

subtitles.original: え、めっちゃ可愛いー！
subtitles.english: Ah, that's incredibly cute!

subtitles.original: 私もぎゅっとしたーい！
subtitles.english: I want to cuddle it too!

subtitles.original: ちょ、チョコせん…先生そんな…
subtitles.english: W-wait, Choco-sen... sensei, please don't... Jacks...

subtitles.original: ぎゅっとしたーい。いつでも…
subtitles.english: I want to hug it... any time...

subtitles.original: あ、いいにおいする。
subtitles.english: Ah, it smells so good.

subtitles.original: あ、やめてください！
subtitles.english: Ah, please stop!

subtitles.original: 本当に…もうまずい、まずい。
subtitles.english: Seriously... this is getting dangerous.

subtitles.original: 四つ目はこちら！
subtitles.english: The fourth item is this!

subtitles.original: 「ばぶラプラスぬいぐるみ」を包めるハンカチです！
subtitles.english: The swaddling handkerchief that can wrap up the "Baby Laplus Plushie"!

subtitles.original: さっきのぬいぐるみをね、包めて、あとは普通にハンカチとしても使えます。
subtitles.english: You can wrap up the plushie from before in it, or you can just use it as a regular handkerchief.

subtitles.original: あ、じゃあ、おくるみとして使えるってことね！
subtitles.english: Ah, so it can be used as a swaddle!

subtitles.original: そうです！
subtitles.english: That's right!

subtitles.original: 可愛い。
subtitles.english: Cute.

subtitles.original: で、デカめ、デカめです、これ。こんなしかないですけど、我が輩の周り。
subtitles.english: It's on the larger side. Though it's only about this big for me.

subtitles.original: そして最後に、フルセット購入特典として、三嶋くろねママ描き下ろしのチェキ風ブロマイドカードが付いてきます！
subtitles.english: And finally, as a full set purchase bonus, you get an instax-style photo card illustrated by Mishima Kurone-mama!

subtitles.original: はい、そして数量限定バージョンは、はい、書きます。サインを！
subtitles.english: Yes, and for the limited-quantity version, I will hand-write my signature!

subtitles.original: 直筆サインと、複製メッセージが入ってます！
subtitles.english: It includes a hand-written signature and a printed message!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Summary**

Okay, here's the breakdown of my process for this project. The primary goal is to generate accurate, context-aware Japanese and English subtitles for this video segment. This means the timecodes need to be spot-on, and the translations have to make sense in context. I'm focusing on the *spoken* audio, so no extraneous on-screen text, which should maintain consistency and no "[sound effects]" or the like.

First, I had to analyze the request to understand the format (a call to `default_api:final_result` with a list of subtitles) and the crucial rules: precise timing, meaningful translation, chronological order, and standardized formatting, but no Closed Caption tags. Then, the process unfolds scene-by-scene, and I ensure proper formatting and translations.

The initial segment is Azusa and Laplus. I've broken down each line and provided both the original Japanese and a natural English translation, matching each subtitle to the frame where it begins, such as: "00:00.000 - 00:01.200: 帰るね！ (I'm heading home!)". I've paid careful attention to Laplus's reactions, making sure to capture the nuances of her expressions, especially when she calls out to "Aju-nee!"

Next, the video jumps to a phone call in an office setting. I've transcribed the producer's lines, the contextually accurate translations, and Laplus's reactions, as she reacts to the news of a new song audition and major collaboration.

The conversation is key. I've captured the producer's explanation, Laplus's initial panic about the tight timeline, and the producer's insistence on completing the audition because there is a major collaboration if it is completed. Laplus's frustration with the situation is very apparent. I had to focus on the cadence and meaning. I captured the tension by including things like the heavy panting from the running.

I have included the dialogue of the gym and the dance studio.

And then comes the key, Choco-sensei! I made sure to include their exchange, and the introductions of the merchandise items.

There were also some tricky wordplay moments. I had to translate Laplus's humorous "景表法…、刑訴..." section in the goods introduction. And I made sure to format it with the correct Japanese characters, and translate it correctly.

For each item, I've detailed the Japanese dialogue, the English translation, and the precise time codes. I've included the card album, keyholder, plushie, and handkerchief, capturing the lively conversation between Laplus and Choco-sensei, including their personal commentary, which adds so much flair. I have included the full-set purchase bonuses, including the hand-written signature bonus.

Finally, I did one more review pass, refining any rough edges and ensuring the subtitles adhere to the formatting guidelines, including no closed caption tags, ensuring chronological order, and matching each line to the exact millisecond. It's time to call the final API.
